nasb.text: Then his servants said to him, “What is this thing that you have done? While the child was alive, you fasted and wept; but when the child died, you arose and ate food.”

esv.text: Then his servants said to him, “What is this thing that you have done? You fasted and wept for the child while he was alive; but when the child died, you arose and ate food.”

cnv.text: 臣僕問他：“你為甚麼這樣作呢？孩子還活著的時候，你為他禁食哭泣；孩子死了，你倒起來吃飯！”

ccb.text: 他的臣仆诧异地问他：“我们真不明白，孩子还活着的时候，你禁食、哀哭。孩子死了，你反倒起来进食。”
